prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: In a T2 work setting, the evaluated element is S-101 Column/beam erection & plumb within 2.4 Structural & Ironwork. The relevant subcategory is 2.4.1 Steel Erection. The observed field condition is: anchor bolts field-bent to fit. The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors AISC 303, OSHA 1926 Subpart R. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: T2 S-101 Measurement & estimation
